data.content:
## TASK SUMMARY
Refactored pricing into typed helpers (line_subtotal, apply_tier_discount) with identical outputs.

## CODE CHANGES
Split the nested conditional into a discount-tier table; added type hints.

## TESTS ADDED
Added 8 characterization tests across tiers and the $500 boundary.

## TEST RESULTS
34 passed, 0 failed
